extractions.text: A midwife saying, This child will be a child of darkness, and the mother replying, No, he will be a child of light.
extractions.reasoning: Part of the dramatic narrative surrounding Tesla's birth, presented as legendary rather than historically verifiable.

extractions.text: It is a beautiful story. It is a perfect opening for a story about the master of electricity.
extractions.reasoning: These are subjective opinions and beliefs of the narrator about the narrative's quality and suitability.

extractions.text: So why does the legend persist? Why did the Tesla family tell the story of the storm for generations?
extractions.reasoning: These are explicit questions posed by the narrator, deliberately left unanswered immediately to build suspense and introduce a new theory.

extractions.text: But thunder without clouds is not weather. It is geology. Or it is ballistics.
extractions.reasoning: This is a speculative reinterpretation of what the 'thunder' might have been, connecting it to non-meteorological phenomena, forming part of the series' invented canon.
